entries.description: Replaced fixed verificationMode line in spec.md.template with whole-line {{VERIFICATION_MODE_LINE}} token; consumerBootstrap.ts renders the full line on lightweight and empty string on full (no blank-line residue); template README token table + never-emit rule updated.

gitScaffold.ts: verification-mode marker write gated to tier===lightweight; on Full neither written nor deleted (preserve-across-round-trip documented in code comment); written list adjusted (tier marker stays unconditional).

L-069-1 sibling audit: buildSessionGenPrompt hard-requirements prose rescoped (Full sets OMIT verificationMode); Full exemplar now omits the line via shared renderSpec; pinned with two Layer-2 tests. verificationModeRewrite handles key-absent specs (insert-on-upgrade) - no change. start-here.md.template step-4 prose mention left as named residual (editing it would break the Lightweight byte-identity tripwire; absence-means-default makes it benign). Engine files clean.

Regenerated test-fixtures/cold-start/full (verificationMode line gone from sample spec config block); lightweight fixture byte-identical (git diff clean - scope tripwire held). Updated consumerBootstrap.test.ts (per-tier presence/absence, no-residue, no-unsubstituted-token), gitScaffoldCore.test.ts (marker write matrix: lightweight writes, full skips, full preserves pre-existing), sessionGenPrompt.test.ts (Full prompt renders no verificationMode line), gettingStartedActions.test.ts (structureOnly counts).

Omission notes added to docs/spec-md-schema.md (field row + prose: Full-tier scaffolds omit the field, Set 082) and session-set-authoring-guide.md (field semantics + example block comment). Echo grep: no shape-uniformity claims remain; remaining inert-on-Full mentions are accurate.

Layer-2 suite green (1270 passing) incl. regenerated goldens; Layer-1 pytest green (2483 passed, 5 skipped); tsc --noEmit clean; npm run compile refreshed dist bundle. Layer 3 not run: no Explorer-rendering surface touched.
routed_gate verdict: REQUIRED (triggers: blast-radius [cross-artifact, shared-schema, wiring], multi-module {docs, test-fixtures, tools}, breadth 20 files).

Cross-provider verification round 1 (gpt-5-4): ISSUES_FOUND - 1 Major (S082-V1-001, fixture marker deletion claimed missing) + 2 nits. Raw output s1-verification.md; structured findings s1-issues.json.

Adjudication: S082-V1-001 is a context gap (no .dabbler file has ever existed under test-fixtures/; golden is render-output-only). record_adjudication logged (context-gap / reverify-reshaped). Nits fixed. Round 2 (gpt-5-4) with reshaped context: VERIFIED; all findings terminally dispositioned. Raw output s1-verification-round-2.md.
